name: Orange Beef
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Top round steak, thinly sliced
Dried red chile peppers, broken into pieces
Fresh ground black pepper, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the sherry, cornstarch, and egg whites until the mixture is foamy.
2. Add the beef and toss to coat the pieces well. Set aside.
3. Cut meat into 2x2-inch pieces.
4. Heat 4 tbsp peanut oil in a wok. Fry quickly, just until crispy and browned, then remove to a plate to drain.
5. Add another 2 tbsp peanut oil to the wok. Add orange rind and red peppers to hot oil in the wok.
6. Stir-fry until orange rind begins to darken and aroma from oil becomes pleasant.
7. Add remaining ingredients (beef stock, light soy sauce, sugar, cornstarch, red wine vinegar) and stir until bubbly. If too thick, add more beef stock.
8. Add fried beef and toss to coat with the sauce.
9. Serve immediately with steamed white rice.
